parameters.name: fps
parameters.label: Frames per Second
parameters.description: The number of frames rendered in the last second.

parameters.name: msec
parameters.label: Frame Time
parameters.description: Amount of time each frame takes to cook in msec.

parameters.name: cook
parameters.label: Cook
parameters.description: Is equal to 1 when a frame is cooked and equal to 0 when a frame is skipped.  It is often useful to view this channel in a to see when frames are skipped (dropped).

parameters.name: droppedframes
parameters.label: Dropped Frames
parameters.description: The number of frames dropped between the last frame and the current frame.

parameters.name: mvreadahead
parameters.label: Movie Read Ahead Misses
parameters.description: How many times the movie read ahead failed to maintain the number of specified Read Ahead frames.

parameters.name: gpumemused
parameters.label: GPU Mem Used (MB)
parameters.description: Amount of memory used (in megabytes).

parameters.name: totalgpumem
parameters.label: Total GPU Mem (MB)
parameters.description: Total amount of memory available on the system (in megabytes).

parameters.name: activeops
parameters.label: Total Active OPs
parameters.description: How many OPs are actively cooking.

parameters.name: deactivatedops
parameters.label: Total Deactivated OP Calls
parameters.description: Number of calls to cook a component that has its turned off.

parameters.name: totalops
parameters.label: Total OPs
parameters.description: Total number of OPs in the file.

parameters.name: cpumemused
parameters.label: CPU Mem Used (MB)
parameters.description: Amount of CPU memory used (in megabytes).

parameters.name: cookstate
parameters.label: Cook State
parameters.description: Monitors which frames actually cooked. Pass the Perform to a Trail to properly see the trail of frames that did and did not cook. (It appears as always 1 because the viewer is displaying only the curr

parameters.name: cookrealtime
parameters.label: Cook Realtime
parameters.description: Monitors the state of the realtime flag, determining if TouchDesigner is running in realtime mode or not.

parameters.name: cookrate
parameters.label: Cookrate
parameters.description: The global target cook rate (frames per second) of the project. This is the frames per second of the root component, , typically , though due to frames taking too long to cook, the actual frames per s

parameters.name: timeslicestep
parameters.label: Time Slice Step
parameters.description: The number of frames that TouchDesigner stepped forward for the current cook. It's the length of the in frames. It will be equal to 1 when the system is taking msec or less to complete one frame (16.6

parameters.name: timeslicemsec
parameters.label: Time Slice Milliseconds
parameters.description: The length of the current in milliseconds.

parameters.name: performmode
parameters.label: Perform Mode
parameters.description: Monitors the state of .

parameters.name: performfocus
parameters.label: Perform Window Focus
parameters.description: Monitors if the Perform currently has focus or not.

parameters.name: gputemp
parameters.label: GPU Temperature (Slow)
parameters.description: Monitors the temperature of the system's GPUs, only works for NVIDIA GPUs.

parameters.name: aclinestatus
parameters.label: AC Line Status
parameters.description: Indicates if the laptop's AC Charger is plugged in and active. 1 if AC line is detected, 0 otherwise.

parameters.name: batterycharging
parameters.label: Battery Charging
parameters.description: Indicates if the battery is being charged. 1 if charging, 0 otherwise.

parameters.name: batterylife
parameters.label: Battery Life
parameters.description: Indicated charge remaining in battery, 1 is battery full, 0 is battery empty.

parameters.name: batterytime
parameters.label: Battery Time
parameters.description: Estimated time remaining in battery charge. Only works if AC Line is disconnected and battery is not being charged.

parameters.name: activeexpressions
parameters.label: Active Expressions
parameters.description: The number of active python expressions found in the project.

parameters.name: optimizedexpression
parameters.label: Optimized Expressions
parameters.description: The number of python expression that have been optimized, see .

parameters.name: cachedexpressions
parameters.label: Expressions Using Cache
parameters.description: The number of python expression that have been cached, see .

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).

parameters.name: cpumsec
parameters.label: Cpumsec
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
